programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Brent Council officers find a severely overcrowded house in north London, while Harrow Council try to help a family forced to sleep in a single room due to leaks coming from the roof. Their landlord is reluctant to complete the work and has instead served them with an eviction notice. Plus, the case of a Birmingham landlord who wants rid of his troublesome tenants, who have not paid rent for more than a year(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Cameras follow the fortunes of grandmother Linda, who was so moved by the plight of the dogs she set up a charity to rescue and re-home canines on the Costa Blanca. Bar owner Dave's first year of trading has gone well, but his establishment is hampered by its lack of a sun terrace, prompting him to make a substantial investment which he hopes will pay off. Elsewhere, Mick and Karen decide to sell on the Showboat to Mick's brother Gary and his fiancee Diane, who feel more motivated to give it the overhaul it requires. Narrated by John Thomson(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the NCIS team investigates a marine sergeant's fall to her death from a building, her doctor, Dr Grace Confalone, confides in Gibbs urging him to consider this a murder investigation. Meanwhile, Torres searches for a place to live(n)

programme.title: Boyfriend Killer (2017)
programme.desc: A grieving mother goes through her dead son's social media accounts to salvage any photos and let his friends know of his death. But when she finds some messages between him and his vindictive girlfriend, she begins to suspect the young woman may have been involved in his death and becomes determined to find out the truth. Thriller, starring Barbie Castro, Patrick Muldoon and Kate Mansi(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross makes a bad impression on his new neighbours, and Monica piles the pressure on Chandler, demanding more commitment than he feels able to give. Joey's latest girlfriend proves a little too fiery - but he is afraid to end their relationship(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: General manager Chris calls a crisis meeting, believing the only chance the railway has of making it through the busy summer season is if an overhaul of Repton - a 1934 Schools-class engine - is completed. This engine has been undergoing restoration for the past five years, but now it is going to be all-hands-on-deck to try and get it back on the rails quickly. Meanwhile, Kieran discovers that a portion of track at one station is subsiding and cannot carry a load. The only option seems to be to shorten the Pullman dining train(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Flight
programme.desc: Documentary examining the royal family's history with air travel, from the first King's Flight in 1936 to the modern-day journeys undertaken by Queen Elizabeth II. Cameras step inside the private world of regal life in the air, uncovering the mysterious traditions and protocols behind royal travel, from the story of the Queen's Commonwealth tour in 1953 to the unique challenges presented in more recent times(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Your Supermarket Food
programme.desc: Sian Williams and Stefan Gates investigate whether fresh fruit and vegetables really are the best option, and whether some five-a-day favourites work out cheaper, tastier and more nutritious when frozen. They compare the sugar levels in fresh juice and smoothies, find out how much a typical family can save by buying frozen instead of fresh, and following the trail of a pea being picked being frozen. Plus, Sian asks whether the term 'freshly baked' bread is misleading and there's a look at the safest way to store food in a fridge(n)

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healy and the experts help Sylvia, who wants to get rid of the scars left by skin cancer and reverse the effects of severe hair loss, and Graham, whose traumatic memories of his time in the Army has led to years of heavy smoking and neglect for his appearance(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: First-hand accounts from people who had bad experiences when they underwent plastic surgery, including a woman whose filler injection hit an artery in her lips, and a man left with physical and emotional scars after undergoing seven operations for his hair loss. Samantha also shares her story, after she ended up in agonising pain after undergoing a breast reduction procedure(n)

programme.title: Killer Psychopaths
programme.desc: Former prison governor and criminologist David Wilson examines the motivations and background of serial killer Joanna Dennehy, a Peterborough mother-of-two who was responsible for the murder of three men in the space of 10 days in March 2013. Dennehy's ex-partner John Treanor speaks candidly to the cameras, and there are also interviews with CPS prosecutor Chris McCann, crime reporter Ben Kendall and Chiara and Dino Lee, whose father Kevin was one of her victims(n)

programme.title: Doctor Dolittle (1967)
programme.desc: A Victorian veterinary surgeon is certified insane after developing the ability to talk to his patients in their own language. Undaunted, he manages to escape from the asylum and embarks on a quest to locate a rare aquatic snail. Oscar-winning musical comedy, with Rex Harrison, Samantha Eggar, Richard Attenborough and Anthony Newley. Songs include Talk to the Animals and I've Never Seen Anything Like It(n)

programme.title: The 300 Spartans (1962)
programme.desc: The ruler of the Persian empire vows to expand his realm by conquering Greece. The king of Sparta steps forward to defend his homeland and the other kingdoms of Greece, but when he is betrayed by a political council, he finds himself without an army and must fend off the vast invading army with a mere 300 warriors. Historical drama, starring Richard Egan, Ralph Richardson and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly(n)

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. He must assemble his own team of adrenaline junkie agents to recover the lethal device. Action thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Toni Collette and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Black Sea (2014)
programme.desc: A submarine captain working for a salvage company is laid off, and attempts to turn his fortunes around by recovering a lost treasure rumoured to have sunk to the depths of the Black Sea. However, greed, desperation and claustrophobia cause the members of his crew to turn against each other. Thriller, starring Jude Law and Jodie Whittaker(n)

programme.title: 21 & Over (2013)
programme.desc: A hard-working student's 21st birthday falls the day before an important interview for medical school. His friends persuade him to come out with them and celebrate, but what was supposed to be one quiet drink rapidly turns into a raucous night of debauchery. Comedy, starring Justin Chon and Miles Teller(n)

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest (1960)
programme.desc: Legendary outlaw hero Robin Hood rallies his merry men to thwart a dastardly plan by the Sheriff of Nottingham to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury, who has denounced the sheriff's plot to confiscate another nobleman's land. Medieval adventure, starring Richard Greene, Peter Cushing, Niall MacGinnis, Richard Pasco, Sarah Branch and Oliver Reed(n)

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley(n)

programme.title: Dark Command (1940)
programme.desc: A teacher is defeated in his ambition to become the marshal of his town during the early years of the American Civil War, so he turns renegade instead. Before long he has a reputation as a feared raider fighting on the side of the South, and it falls to the newly appointed lawman whose job he coveted to stop his reign of terror. Western, starring John Wayne and Walter Pidgeon(n)

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael(n)

programme.title: Big Stone Gap (2014)
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed spinster finds her life shaken up after learning a long-buried family secret. Romantic comedy, starring Ashley Judd and Patrick Wilson(n)

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor(n)

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi (2016)
programme.desc: A US embassy in Libya comes under attack from extremists, who kill the ambassador. With no help in sight, a small band of CIA security operatives from various military backgrounds takes a stand to fight off the attackers and protect the remaining diplomatic personnel. Fact-based action thriller, starring John Krasinski and James Badge Dale(n)

programme.title: Leaning into the Wind (2017)
programme.desc: Thomas Riedelsheimer's documentary following artist Andy Goldsworthy as he creates works that mediate, disrupt or commune with the environment(n)

programme.title: The Man from the Alamo (1953)
programme.desc: A soldier serving at the battle of the Alamo is sent to warn his comrades' families of the impending danger, but ends up falsely branded a deserter. He tries to clear his name with acts of heroism, including tracking down the traitor who robbed the casualties after the battle was over. Western, starring Glenn Ford and Julia Adams(n)

programme.title: Charade (1963)
programme.desc: A distraught widow learns her husband was murdered for his part in a $250,000 robbery. The haul has gone missing, and his former accomplices are soon on her tail in the hunt for the missing proceeds. Not knowing where to turn, she takes up the offer of help from a dashing stranger, but is uncertain whether she can trust him. Romantic thriller, with Audrey Hepburn, Cary Grant, Walter Matthau and James Coburn(n)

programme.title: Flying Tigers (1942)
programme.desc: An American pilot leads a squadron of volunteer aviators to help China's fledgling air force fight the Japanese during the Second World War. However, he has to contend with the consequences when the actions of an arrogant hotshot pilot lead to the death of a fellow veteran airman. Drama, starring John Wayne, John Carroll, Anna Lee and Paul Kelly(n)

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde(n)

programme.title: X-Men: The Last Stand (2006)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes return to face a battle on three fronts. Arch-enemy Magneto is back with an army of followers, while a corporation has created a drug that permanently robs mutants of their powers. Meanwhile, their former ally Jean Grey has returned from the dead as the destructive and seemingly unstoppable Phoenix. The third instalment of the superhero saga, starring Hugh Jackman, Ian McKellen, Famke Janssen, Halle Berry and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Atomic Blonde (2017)

The city is in a dangerously unstable state, and she finds herself targetted by multiple factions plotting to exploit the uncertain future for their own ruthless ends. Thriller, starring Charlize Theron, James McAvoy and John Goodman(n)

Crime thriller sequel based on the comic-book series, starring Eva Green, Mickey Rourke, Jessica Alba and Josh Brolin(n)

programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw take a trip to northern France to collect 94-year-old wartime hero Roger's 1968 Citroen DS, a car he has owned since it was new. Known as the most beautiful car ever made, the iconic DS was once a real head-turner. However, after decades in a barn, Roger's vehicle is long past its sell-by date. Tim and Fuzz struggle with its radical design features and once again race against time to reveal this very special restored car to its unsuspecting owner(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets architect and shed fanatic Micah Jones, who plans to transform an old agricultural building in Co Down, Northern Ireland. programme.title: Skeletons of the Mary Rose: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Scientists and historians use isotope and DNA analysis to identify the crew of Henry VIII's flagship, which sank off the coast of Portsmouth in 1545. With the help of Mary Rose Trust curator Alex Hildred, the programme uncovers evidence that many of the sailors were of African origin, and traces surviving descendants of the only two members of the crew who can be identified by name. Plus, the little-known story of a 16th-century Guinean free-diver who retrieved several treasures from the wreck(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Across the UK, around 2,200 women go into labour every day. Most make it to hospital, but for those who cannot, the ambulance service is there to help. The programme features call handlers giving worried partners advice while staff race to deliver the baby, and reveals how some new parents overreact and call 999 at the first sign of a cough or a bump to the head(n)

programme.desc: Unexplained events during wartime, including German submarines that discovered previously unknown sea creatures and a Japanese bomb that floated on the jet stream(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris takes a railway trip across Canada, revealing how 2,500 miles of transcontinental railway was built against huge odds in just a few decades, helping to join together a vast wilderness of isolated communities and create the country that exists today. He begins his journey on one of the earliest sections of track to be built, on a train that is now a lifeline for hunters and fishermen. He then sees one of the biggest, most famous trains in the world - the Canadian, before heading for the Prairies, and on to the port of Vancouver. Along the way he also searches for Winnie the Pooh, crosses raging rivers and meets the descendant of a pioneering Yorkshire family who arrived here more than 100 years ago(n)

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: The team travels along the 100-mile stretch of coast between Holyhead and Liverpool. Miranda Krestovnikoff searches for one of the longest-living creatures on the planet in the Menai Straits, while Alice Roberts discovers how a young survivor of a shipwreck helped to found modern orthopaedic surgery. Nick Crane investigates beach pebbles, and Neil Oliver looks around a mysterious cave on the Great Orme(n)

programme.title: Deep Wreck Mysteries

programme.title: The Day They Dropped the Bomb
programme.desc: Documentary marking the 70th anniversary of the day the world's first atomic bomb was detonated above the Japanese city of Hiroshima on August 6, 1945. Featuring a minute-by-minute account of what happened on that tragic day, through archive footage and interviews with eyewitnesses who rarely speak about their experience of the bombing. programme.title: The Normans

The Normans blended well in Scotland, but faced fierce opposition in Wales, and promoted divisions in Ireland which some claim still exist to this day(n)

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett examines the Normans' expansion toward southern Europe and the Middle East in the 11th century. Southern Italy and Sicily were conquered and a prosperous kingdom flourished on the island, which became an important centre of medieval culture and an example of harmony between religions. However, Pope Urban II's call for holy war against the Muslims, to win Jerusalem back, led to the Normans embarking on the First Crusade(n)

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Historian Stephen Baxter explores his own theory that the Domesday Book was commissioned to confer revolutionary powers on the monarchy in the 11th century, and not intended as a means to collect taxes. He examines how the first great national survey, which recorded who owned every piece of land and property in England, was a massive logistical exercise that documented the traumatic impact of the Norman Conquest(n)

programme.title: Fantomworks

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day from in and around Reading, and hoping to finish the week £1,000 better off is 42-year-old music merchandiser, Rob(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's new girlfriend causes problems with the Barones, who begin to question his motives for seeing her. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray are asked to film a video tribute to Frank, who has been named Man of the Year at his lodge, but find none of the other members can stand him(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Special episode filmed on location in Seattle. Frasier is guest of honour at a public rally to mark his 1,000th radio show - but the celebrations go awry as Niles's jealousy reaches new peaks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

Phil helps Cara and Ben search for a family home near Bishop's Stortford(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie builds a huge percola on the terrace for her mother's wedding, while Sarah and George set up a photoshoot to drum up business and unearth a secret underground room(n)

programme.title: Coronavirus: Can You Avoid It?
programme.desc: Special programme looking at the current outbreak of Covid-19 in the UK by exploring how viruses - as well as other germs - are transmitted. This is demonstrated through a series of visual tests covering all aspects of a typical day at home, on the commute and at work. The film looks at what people touch and the multiple surface areas they encounter every day, as well as how respiratory droplets are spread through sneezing and coughing. There are also interviews with experts and members of the public, who share their views on the pandemic(n)

programme.title: The Undateables
programme.desc: Series following extraordinary singletons as they try to search for romance. Meanwhile, 21-year-old Lily, who is from Hampshire and has William's Syndrome, has not been out on a date in two years(n)

programme.desc: Donald Trump invites Charles and Camilla to abandon England and become king and queen of America - but Wills suspect there is a sinister agenda behind the offer. Call handlers are finding their work increasingly demoralising, while the squeeze on resources is not helped by the public's ever-broadening sense of what constitutes an emergency(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: A specialist team unearth a long-lost tomb in the shadow of the pyramids, as archaeologists hunt for remains and explore hidden tombs in the Valley of the Kings. Why did the great pharaohs of Egypt abandon the pyramids of Giza and choose a secret cemetery in the valley for their burial ground? In the shadow of the pyramids, an extraordinary discovery is made in a rare tomb 4,500 years old; while a team from the University of Basle take up the hunt for clues to identify human remains found in looted tombs(n)

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: The strain the Covid-19 outbreak is putting on the health service(n)

At Nikolas Patrick in London, pawnbroking brothers Charlie and Patrick Devine consider deals on Harry Potter's broomstick and an impressive collection of Manchester United memorabilia(n)

programme.desc: Debra takes Ally and the twins to her parents' house, leaving Ray at home by himself - and he finds it impossible to get to sleep. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle(n)

programme.desc: Boat-dwelling Steven kicks off the competition in East Anglia, accompanied by his partner of 10 years, Lisa, with a Sunday lunch-inspired roast dinner with a fresh fish starter. programme.desc: Ray tells Debra she takes up too much room in bed - but he comes to regret complaining when she banishes him to the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: An African dictator who has been charged with crimes against humanity is brought in for treatment, causing a moral dilemma for the staff. Meanwhile, Wilson tries to make amends with a feuding neighbour - a problem exacerbated by House's prying. Guest starring James Earl Jones, with Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A boy suffering from mysterious stomach pains is brought into the hospital by his oil executive father, who believes that the illness is punishment for his financial successes. Meanwhile, Foreman and Chase prepare a presentation on the Dibala case. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary following the inhabitants of the seaside village of Jaywick in Essex, where more than half of the residents are on state welfare. Tony Taylor claims £51.40 a week and does odd jobs in exchange for food, enabling his benefits money to go a bit further, while Claire has moved from east London's Canning Town in search of a better life with her fiance Luke, their young baby and her two older children, who live with a host of pets in a two-bedroom house(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. Rebecca is 16 and expecting her first baby with 17-year-old boyfriend Sonny, who is adamant he will be in work by the time the child arrives, while her foster mother Anita is concerned she will be unable to afford her house when her children move out. Gordon has not worked in decades and has very strong political views as to why employment has eluded him and many others in the north of England(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Dr Lisa Cuddy experiences a particularly stressful day as she deals with staff and hospital issues that test her skills as an administrator - on top of her busy personal life. Medical drama, starring Lisa Edelstein and Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: After taking on the case of an enthusiastic blogger, House and the team debate the value of privacy. Elsewhere, Chase is coaxed back on to the dating scene. Medical drama, starring Olivia Wilde and Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. Ion is from Romania and wants to make £40,000 from benefits to help him build a new house for his family back in his home village, while Katarina arrived from Slovakia seven years ago and has 11 children and 11 grandchildren living in and around an estate in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Nottingham resident Viorel is 25 and lost both legs in an accident in his native Romania when he was seven, and now wants to pursue a career in the movies(n)

programme.desc: After the traumatic birth of her first-born son, 36-year-old Michelle is determined to have an easier time with her second, but scans reveal their baby could be bigger than average(n)

Meanwhile, Tommy suspects August of cheating on him so he sends Harry to spy on her and Don is jealous of Sally's new friend - a tomato plant. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Wayne Knight(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A reckless police detective believes he has been cursed with the same heart condition that caused three generations of men in his family to die aged 40, and House begins to wonder if he has developed a hearing problem. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie and Robert Sean Leonard(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor bonds with Wilson and Cuddy when they spend a weekend away at a medical conference, and a teenager with a penchant for lying is rushed to hospital with severely swollen appendages - but refuses to disclose how she fell ill. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein and Robert Sean Leonard(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition focuses on young people living on state welfare, including 18-year-old Dean from Harlow in Essex, who has no intention of getting a job unless forced. Twentysomethings Danielle and her boyfriend Josh are unable to work due to anxiety and depression and have moved to Blackpool to make a new start. However, with four children between them from previous relationships and another on the way they are struggling to make ends meet on a joint benefits income of around £100 a week(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of individuals on the dole in the UK follows the stories of Roma people who moved to the UK and are now surviving on payments from the welfare state. Ion is from Romania and wants to make £40,000 from benefits to help him build a new house for his family back in his home village, while Katarina arrived from Slovakia seven years ago and has 11 children and 11 grandchildren living in and around an estate in Rotherham, South Yorkshire. Nottingham resident Viorel is 25 and lost both legs in an accident in his native Romania when he was seven, and now wants to pursue a career in the movies(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A high-school student blacks out during a class field trip. When her condition fails to stabilise and she experiences repeated hallucinations, House suggests using a dangerous method to monitor her brain activity. Taub's private life becomes public knowledge, and Chez Hilson undergoes a makeover(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The hospital is placed in lockdown when a newborn goes missing, prompting staff members to open up to their colleagues in a series of heart-to-hearts that sees Cameron reunited with Chase when she returns to Princeton-Plainsboro. Directed by Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor attempt to collect £5,000 owed by a debtor in north Wales, but the situation spirals out of control when a group of friends try to take on the agents. Meanwhile, Del and Dael head to south-east London to chase nearly £7,000 owed by a man to his ex-girlfriend, before visiting a woman who owes her solicitor almost £4,000 after a compensation claim went wrong. In Manchester, Stewart and Vic face a hostile reception at a family run garage that owes £6,000 in professional fees(n)

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: After the traumatic birth of her first-born son, 36-year-old Michelle is determined to have an easier time with her second, but scans reveal their baby could be bigger than average(n)

programme.title: Hurricane Hell: Superstorm
programme.desc: In just one month, Houston, Florida, Puerto Rico and the Caribbean were changed forever. In summer 2017, three monster hurricanes swept in from the Atlantic one after another, shattering storm records and killing hundreds of people. Experts address the issue of whether these superstorms will become more prevalent(n)

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow (2004)
programme.desc: A climatologist warns global warming will soon result in destructive freak weather, or even another ice age. He thinks the world still has time to prepare for the worst, but the crisis happens almost immediately - and as storms, earthquakes and hurricanes strike in terrifying fashion, he races across America to rescue his son from a frozen New York. Disaster thriller, with Jake Gyllenhaal and Dennis Quaid(n)

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

One of the group documents their journey on a video camera, creating a first-hand record of the carnage. Found-footage thriller, starring Michael Stahl-David and Lizzy Caplan(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor wins back his medical licence, and uses his expertise to help an adult film star with an eye problem. Cuddy addresses her personal relationships as her private life comes under scrutiny. Guest starring Troy Garity, with Hugh Laurie and Lisa Edelstein(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Thanksgiving arrives, but the doctors' personal lives leave them with little cause for celebration. Meanwhile, House takes on the case of a brilliant physicist who has chosen to neglect his talents and pursue a career as a courier. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein and Robert Sean Leonard(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord's tenants refuse to move out, so he starts extensive building work around them, while another landlord tries to recover £30,000 in unpaid rent through the courts(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Life on the dole in Scotland, including aspiring pop stars Zedd and Saffire, who live in Portobello, Edinburgh and receive £17,000 a year in benefits. After a failed attempt to start her own business in Australia, Kit is back in her home town of Wishaw, North Lanarkshire, to sign on and stay with friends, while Stirling resident Kirsty is desperate for work and is convinced her weight and mild learning disability are stopping her from getting a job. The 30-year-old's stay-at-home parents Rosie and Desmond believe that discrimination is to blame(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Immigrants who claim welfare to support children who live back in their home countries. Self-employed scrap-metal collector and father-of-three Ion came to the UK at the start of 2014 and estimates he gets £1,200 in benefits a month, and is spending virtually all of it renovating his family home back in rural Romania. Evita Kossmann lives in Warsaw and gets around £220 a month in British benefits for her 10-year-old son Mateusz because her husband Sebastian resides and works in Bristol(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor helps a patient who has modelled himself on a knight and lives by the ideals of the High Renaissance, and a relationship is reignited for Wilson. Medical drama, starring Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctors are baffled by a patient who leads an unorthodox life, and House puts Sam and Wilson's relationship to the test. Guest starring Sarah Wayne Callies (Prison Break)(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Three disputes between people whose houses border each other in Spain, including a couple whose dreams of a new life abroad were left in tatters after a campaign of vandalism and abuse, sparked by building a private terrace. Elsewhere, a woman who built an animal sanctuary discovers that local hunters use her land, but her decision to revoke their permission sparked an horrific turn of events(n)

programme.title: Big Family Values: More Kids Than Cash
programme.desc: A family of 12 moves into a 14-acre property in Cornwall hoping to make a fresh start and provide a better quality of life for the children. In Essex, a couple with a 26-year age gap and eight children hope to make a profit by opening a shop selling party supplies(n)

programme.title: And Proud
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on habitual thieves who are unapologetic about their crimes, including 23-year-old Jade, who has been banned from every store in her home town of Stockport, Greater Manchester. The programme also meets Ian and Amanda, who shoplift to order and have clocked up almost 300 charges between them, and Barry, who steals books by request, ranging from bestsellers to educational material(n)

programme.title: Limitless (2011)
programme.desc: A failed writer acquires a supply of an experimental drug that enables his brain to process and learn information at a superhuman rate. His new-found abilities allow him to make a killing on the stock market, but he soon attracts the attention of shadowy forces who have sinister plans for him. Sci-fi thriller, with Bradley Cooper, Robert De Niro and Abbie Cornish(n)

programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica receives a plea for help from an old friend who fears she may be going out of her mind, convinced she is being haunted by the ghost of her first husband. When the woman's current beau turns up dead, the sleuth goes on a mission to prove her innocence. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The legal advisor returns to his childhood home to help a young man whose connection to the town reflects his own(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Animal rights activists are implicated in the death of an Aids researcher killed by a bite from an infected monkey, and use the ensuing court case to drum up support for their cause. As events unfold, McCoy and Carmichael find themselves debating ethics with lawyers who argue the protection of animal life is a valid defence in a murder case(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a Central Park lake during a Puerto Rican Day parade. The victim turns out to be the wife of a powerful billionaire, and pressure is put on the police to find the culprit quickly. Suspicion falls on the business partner of the victim's husband and a witness comes forward to identify him, making everything seem clear cut - but not for long(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is mysteriously killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah, brought from Poland to America. Detectives follow the trail to a man who confesses to the murder, but explains that his cousin paid the victim to defile the book. As ADA McCoy probes the family feud, he learns it may be linked to a lucrative property sale. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston, Allan Miller, Zach Grenier and Mark Feuerstein(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A retired cop exacts rough justice and kills the small-time thug responsible for fatally stabbing a Mob accountant, but tries to avoid going to trial by admitting he falsified evidence during his time on the force - a potentially damaging confession that could jeopardise many previous convictions. Guest starring Amy Ryan (The Wire, The Office: An American Workplace)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are convinced that former career criminal Cally Lonegan has killed his business partner who had been stealing company money. However, their suspect has a cast iron alibi - he is a Mob informant and at the time of the murder was being followed by the FBI. The case takes a more complicated turn when an eyewitness is found dead and the detectives discover Lonegan has a twin brother(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A cop is murdered during a botched robbery, triggering an investigation that leads Green and Cassady to a paparazzo who may have compromising photos of a celebrity and her baby. The case later goes to trial, but proceedings are overshadowed by a debate about tabloid journalism. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Callers to the emergency services report seeing a photograph of a murdered woman on the internet, and when Green and Cassady investigate, they realise her clothes do not fit properly. They trace her unusual attire to a mentally disturbed man, who protests that the victim's daughter asked him to kill her mother. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The two Marine brothers of a sailor battling leukaemia are killed in the line of duty, and to spare the servicemen's family further grief, the secretary of the US Navy seeks the NCIS team's help in locating a suitable bone marrow donor. Meanwhile, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for Thanksgiving. Military crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: Keaton and the CoIntel team must locate a domestic target before Chigorin launches an all-out assault on unsuspecting innocents(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate when the body of a murdered prostitute is found in Times Square, and are shocked at the insensitivity with which a cocky vice detective is handling the crime. Relieving him of duty, they soon link the woman's death to the murders of two other call girls, and start to believe a serial killer may be at work. Police drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An acclaimed travel writer is found murdered with underwear stuffed in his mouth, and the unassuming boyfriend of his landlady comes under suspicion. Meanwhile, a precocious girl shocks Stabler with her knowledge of sex, and makes him uncomfortable at the thought that his own 14-year-old daughter is on the verge of entering the dating scene. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rapist's claims that he is genetically predisposed to commit sex crimes creates outrage among the team(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When young investment banker Zoe White accuses billionaire client Eli Colton of rape, a past 'victim' of Eli's is discovered, though her payoff included a nondisclosure agreement. Zoe gets cold feet just before trial when she is made an offer she struggles to refuse - a job in Europe with a salary of $5million. However, Benson is deternined to see justice done(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A cameraman who films crime scenes is found murdered in his car, and hidden video footage soon leads the team to realise he was blackmailing one of the city's wealthiest families(n)

programme.desc: Burgess encourages her sister to spend a night out with friends, but when it turns out Nicole never made it home, she is found in a railway station - a victim of sexual assault(n)

programme.desc: Jessica visits a lakeside resort to complete her latest mystery novel, only to be sidetracked by a real-life killing when she sees a woman fall from a boat. Starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley and John Astin(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.desc: A restaurant owner is beaten to death and Briscoe and Green's investigation leads them to a gang of thrill-seeking teenagers who tried to steal from the victim but ended up killing him. The ensuing case leaves McCoy with a dilemma over whether the accused are old enough to face the death penalty(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a gay man beaten to death during the abduction of his adopted infant son. At first they suspect the victim's wealthy partner may be complicit in the crime - until information about the child's birth mother and homophobic biological father prompts them to pursue a different line of inquiry(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman produces video footage proving that her journalist boyfriend took his own life, but suspicious marks near his shoulder cause detectives Fontana and Green to investigate. After careful review, Borgia notices something on the tape that might shed light on what actually happened. Guest starring Jessalyn Gilsig (Glee)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Fontana and Green investigate the strangling of a promising student at a specialist school. A suspect is soon arrested and charged - but formidable defence attorney Rebecca Shane (Kathleen Turner) tries to get him cleared by arguing he committed the crime while under the influence of prescription medication. Crime drama, starring Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the attempted murder of a tough judge, but when the culprit is found Carmichael and McCoy have a difficult time building a case. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a woman killed in what appears to be a road rage incident. However, as they retrace her last actions, they suspect she was accidentally murdered by an assassin following the wrong car. The intended victim turns out to be a reporter claiming to have uncovered a plot to rig an election by a senator, who Briscoe suspects of having connections with the Mafia(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl is killed in a building explosion, triggering an investigation that leads Green and Cassady to the property owner's ex-wife. Although they have no firm proof, McCoy pursues her in the courts - but Rubirosa finds a vital clue that leads the case in another direction(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady look into the murder of Carl Mullaly, who had recently been profiled on HardFocus, a magazine programme that identifies sex offenders. The only witness is an eight-year-old girl and detectives soon make an arrest, but learn the tabloid talk show may have been more involved than it initially appeared(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky is assaulted by a man who claims to have previously undisclosed information about his half-brother, who died decades ago. While his NCIS colleagues traces the attacker's whereabouts, Dr Mallard recalls the emotional final days he spent with his sibling. Elsewhere, as the holiday season approaches, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship. Naval crime drama, starring David McCallum(n)

programme.desc: Andy considers her future with Sam after learning about Marlo's pregnancy, but her ideas are put into perspective when she meets a teen in trouble(n)

Acclaimed drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A paroled sex offender is suspected of murder when the abused body of an eight-year-old boy is found in a park - but the investigators face a tough challenge when they arrive at the man's house, only to find a mob of angry parents baying for blood outside. Police drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A computer genius is accused of murdering his girlfriend, but responds to the team's investigation by threatening to expose their darkest secrets(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Barba ask witnesses to risk their jobs when a news anchor makes a rape accusation against her boss on the air(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A teenage boy is shot dead, and when the gun is recovered it turns out to be the same one used in a case from 17 years earlier - meaning Voight put away an innocent man(n)

programme.desc: Intelligence investigate an armed bank heist, which leads them to a teenage gang run by an older Fagin-like criminal. A second incident ends in tragedy for Lindsay and another detective from the robbery-homicide division tries to take over the investigation.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While spending a day at the races, Jessica's jockey niece is accused of murdering a leading horse owner, so the sleuthing novelist sets about solving the elaborate framing. Starring Angela Lansbury and Linda Grovenor(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. An episode paying homage to Alfred Hitchcock's film Rear Window, starring Gary Sinise, with Claire Forlani(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The legal adviser assists Ginny Bretton, the CEO of a company accused of killing an employee with its self-driving car. However, his client is withholding a major secret(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant loan officer is found murdered in the boot of her car and the trail leads to drugs and a professional basketball player, whose ties to the victim appear to extend beyond the financial deal she approved for him. Detective drama, with Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the suspicious death of a reality TV contestant. They discover the show's producers had been provoking bad feeling toward the dead man among his fellow participants, while a cameraman reveals that his last moments were captured on film. However, the incriminating tape cannot be found. Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman admits to murdering her teenage son, but pleads mitigating circumstances, claiming she killed him out of fear that he would become a menace to society, like his criminal father. McCoy and Borgia charge her, but a clever defence attorney argues that she did society a favour and suggests new video evidence might sway a jury. Drama, starring Annie Parisse and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a female jogger is found in a park, and detectives Briscoe and Green discover she was mauled to death by a pit-bull terrier. The race is on to trace the animal and its owner before another tragedy occurs - and the team is shocked to discover a warehouse where dogs are trained for illegal fighting. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The CEO of a military equipment contractor is murdered, leading Cassady and Green to initially suspect anti-war protesters. Guest starring Titus Welliver (The Good Wife), with Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actor wearing blood-stained clothing is arrested for drink-driving, and makes his situation worse by embarking on a racist speech. Crime drama, guest starring Chevy Chase(n)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Noel Edmonds hosts the high-stakes game show, which sees contestants trying to hold their nerve in the hope of walking away with £250,000 - instead of going home with nothing more than a penny(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)

programme.title: Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Another two families compete for spot prizes and a cash jackpot of £3,000. Hosted by Les Dennis(n)

programme.title: Weakest Link
programme.desc: Anne Robinson hosts the quick-fire general knowledge quiz where players answer questions to add to a prize pot, voting off who they think is the weakest link after each round.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman(n)
